paragraphs.text: 今天是母亲节，我想给妈妈做一顿早餐。我决定做简单的煎蛋和烤面包。
paragraphs.translation: Today is Mother's Day, I want to make breakfast for Mom. I decide to make simple fried eggs and toast.

paragraphs.text: 我打开煤气，往锅里倒了一点油。把鸡蛋打进去，滋啦滋啦响。第一次煎蛋有点紧张。
paragraphs.translation: I turn on the gas and pour a little oil into the pan. I crack the egg in, sizzle sizzle. I'm a bit nervous frying an egg for the first time.

paragraphs.text: 妈妈起床看到早餐，又惊又喜。她吃了一口说：真好吃！我心里美滋滋的。
paragraphs.translation: Mom woke up and saw the breakfast, surprised and delighted. She took a bite and said: Delicious! I felt so proud inside.
